heading: Disclosure to foreign antitrust authority of antitrust evidence
label: 6201 Disclosure to foreign antitrust authority of antitrust evidence
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in original “this Act”, meaning , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note below and Tables.Pub. L. 103–438108 Stat. 4597Nov. 2, 1994

Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 103–438, § 1108 Stat. 4597Nov. 2, 1994“This Act [enacting this chapter and amending sections 46, 57b–1, 1311, and 1312 of this title] may be cited as the ‘International Antitrust Enforcement Assistance Act of 1994’.”
amendments: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in original “this Act”, meaning , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note below and Tables.Pub. L. 103–438108 Stat. 4597Nov. 2, 1994

Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 103–438, § 1108 Stat. 4597Nov. 2, 1994“This Act [enacting this chapter and amending sections 46, 57b–1, 1311, and 1312 of this title] may be cited as the ‘International Antitrust Enforcement Assistance Act of 1994’.”

children.text: in determining whether a person has violated or is about to violate any of the foreign antitrust laws administered or enforced by the foreign antitrust authority, or
in enforcing any of such foreign antitrust laws.
